# Leverage Gemini in your Android apps, Global Gamer Challenge, and more dev news!

<SocialEmbed platform="youtube" id="2HrFs0Lfb-w" />

## Description

TL;DR 373  | The Google Developer News Show

0:00 - Intro 
0:09 - Leverage Gemini in your Android apps → https://goo.gle/4aZCnjN 
0:51 - Announcing the Global Gamers Challenge → https://goo.gle/4aVHAZZ 
1:23 - Solution Challenge 2024 → https://goo.gle/4b2gbpp 

Here to bring you the latest developer news from across Google is Rody Davis. Tune in every week for a new episode, and let us know what you think of the latest announcements in the comments below.

Follow Google for Developers on Instagram → https://goo.gle/googledevs

Watch more #DevShow → https://goo.gle/GDevShow
Subscribe to Google for Developers → https://goo.gle/developers

Products Mentioned: Gemini Nano

#Google #Developers

Speaker: Rody Davis
Products Mentioned: Google AI, Gemini

## Transcript

### Intro

**0:00** · \[MUSIC PLAYING\] RODY DAVIS: Hi.

**0:03** · I'm Rody for "The Developer Show."

**0:04** · And this is your weekly update on the coolest developer news from Google.

**0:08** · Have you integrated AI into your Android apps yet?

### Leverage Gemini in your Android apps

**0:10** · If not, now is the perfect time to leverage Gemini in Android.

**0:14** · Android can run a local model called Gemini Nano on select devices.

**0:18** · But to target all Android models, you can use Gemini Pro, which runs off device in Google data centers.

**0:24** · Gemini can be called via the Gemini API and Google AI SDK.

**0:29** · To get started with prompts and testing various interactions, you can use the new Google AI Studio to generate API keys, code snippets, and easily go from idea to app.

**0:38** · Lastly, you can import the fresh generative AI sample in Android Studio.

**0:42** · Make sure to leave a comment and let us know what you're building with Gemini Pro.

**0:46** · To learn more, check out the Android Developers blog link below.

**0:50** · We are excited to release the new Global Gamers Challenge for Flutter.

### Announcing the Global Gamers Challenge

**0:54** · This is an eight-week contest to design, build, and publish sustainable games sponsored by Flutter and Global Citizen.

**1:00** · The awards will be judged based on the following criteria-- originality and creativity, sustainable action and story, use of animation, and effective multi-platform development.

**1:11** · The contest winners will receive a trip to New York City in September and meet some of the Flutter team for a day of workshops and mentorship, and then celebrate with 60,000 global citizens at the Global Citizen Festival in 2024.

### Solution Challenge 2024

**1:24** · To learn more, check out flutter.dev/global-gamers.

**1:29** · If you're a student developer, then check out the new Solution Challenge 2024 for using technology to address UN sustainable development goals.

**1:37** · This year marks the five-year anniversary of the Google Developer Student Clubs Solution challenge, and we're excited to be back.

**1:43** · There are some great prizes.

**1:45** · And the first hundred winners will be announced in April.

**1:47** · Make sure to submit your project by February 22 at the link below.

**1:52** · To learn more about all this week's stories, make sure to check the description box below for all the links.

**1:56** · Please remember to like, subscribe, share, and stay safe.

**1:59** · I'm Rody for "The Developer Show."

**2:00** · Thanks for watching.

**2:01** · And we'll see you next week.

**2:02** · \[MUSIC PLAYING\]
